mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `petlog`.`feed` (user_id, title, content, like_count, comment_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{createdAt}, null)
mapper.select: SELECT `t1`.`id` AS `feedId`, `t1`.`user_id` AS `userId`, `t1`.`title` AS `title`, `t1`.`content` AS `content`, `t1`.`like_count` AS `likeCount`, `t1`.`comment_count` AS `commentCount`, `t1`.`created_at` AS `createdAt`, `t1`.`updated_at` AS `updatedAt`, `t2`.`nickname` AS `nickname`, `t3`.`image_url` AS `profileImageUrl`, `t4`.`address_primary` AS address FROM `petlog`.`feed` AS `t1` JOIN `petlog`.`personal_user` AS `t2` ON `t1`.`user_id` = `t2`.`user_id` LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`pets` AS `t3` ON `t1`.user_id = `t3`.user_id AND `t3`.is_primary = 1 LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`address` AS `t4` ON `t1`.`user_id` = `t4`.`user_id` WHERE `t1`.`id` = #{id}

SELECT `t1`.`id` AS `feedId`, `t1`.`user_id` AS `userId`, `t1`.`title` AS `title`, `t1`.`content` AS `content`, `t1`.`like_count` AS `likeCount`, `t1`.`comment_count` AS `commentCount`, `t1`.`created_at` AS `createdAt`, `t1`.`updated_at` AS `updatedAt`, `t2`.`nickname` AS `nickname`, `t3`.`image_url` AS `profileImageUrl`, `t4`.`address_primary` AS address FROM `petlog`.`feed` AS `t1` JOIN `petlog`.`personal_user` AS `t2` ON `t1`.`user_id` = `t2`.`user_id` LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`pets` AS `t3` ON `t1`.user_id = `t3`.user_id AND `t3`.is_primary = 1 LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`address` AS `t4` ON `t1`.`user_id` = `t4`.`user_id` WHERE SUBSTRING_INDEX(`t4`.`address_primary`, ' ', 1) LIKE CONCAT(#{address}, '%') AND t1.id != #{id} ORDER BY t1.created_at DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT `t1`.`id` AS feedId, `t2`.`thumbnail_url` AS thumbnailUrl, `t2`.`media_type` AS mediaType FROM `petlog`.`feed` AS `t1` LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`feed_media` AS `t2` ON `t1`.`id` = `t2`.`feed_id` AND `t2`.`id` = (SELECT `fm`.`id` FROM `petlog`.`feed_media` AS `fm` WHERE `t1`.id = `fm`.feed_id ORDER BY `fm`.`sort_order` LIMIT 1) LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`personal_user` AS `t3` ON `t1`.user_id = `t3`.user_id WHERE `t3`.`nickname` = #{nickname} ORDER BY `t1`.`created_at` DESC

SELECT `t3`.`id` AS `feedId`, `t4`.`thumbnail_url` AS `thumbnailUrl`, `t4`.`media_type` AS `mediaType` FROM `petlog`.`personal_user` `t1` JOIN `petlog`.`feed_likes` `t2` ON `t2`.`user_id` = `t1`.`user_id` JOIN `petlog`.`feed` `t3` ON `t2`.`feed_id` = `t3`.`id` LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`feed_media` `t4` ON `t4`.`feed_id` = `t3`.`id` AND `t4`.`sort_order` = 0 WHERE `t1`.`nickname` = #{nickname} ORDER BY `t2`.`created_at` DESC

SELECT `t2`.`id` AS feedId, `t3`.`thumbnail_url` AS thumbnailUrl, `t3`.`media_type` AS mediaType FROM `petlog`.`follows` AS `t1` JOIN `petlog`.`feed` AS `t2` ON `t1`.`followed_user_id` = `t2`.`user_id` LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`feed_media` AS `t3` ON `t2`.`id` = `t3`.`feed_id` WHERE `t1`.`following_user_id` = (SELECT `user_id` FROM `petlog`.`personal_user` WHERE `nickname` = #{nickname}) AND `t3`.`sort_order` = 0 ORDER BY `t2`.`created_at` DESC

SELECT `t1`.`feed_id` AS feedId, `t2`.`nickname` AS nickname, `t1`.`address` AS address, `t2`.`profile_image_url` AS profileImageUrl, `t3`.`thumbnail_url` AS thumbnailUrl, `t1`.`title` AS title, `t1`.`like_count` AS likeCount, `t1`.`comment_count` AS commentCount, `t1`.`created_at` AS createdAt,
CASE WHEN #{userId} IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN `t4`.`user_id` IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS liked
FROM `petlog`.`feed` `t1` JOIN `petlog`.`personal_user` `t2` ON `t2`.user_id = `t1`.user_id
LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`feed_media` `t3` ON `t3`.feed_id = `t1`.feed_id AND `t3`.sort_order = 0
LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`feed_likes` `t4` ON `t4`.`feed_id` = `t1`.`feed_id` AND `t4`.`user_id` = #{userId}
WHERE `t2`.`nickname` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR `t1`.`title` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY `t1`.`like_count` DESC, `t1`.`id` DESC
ORDER BY `t1`.`created_at` DESC, `t1`.`id` DESC
LIMIT 20
